title: F3 CHANGER
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod to toggle the F3 debug menu with a custom keybinding.
body:
A lightweight Minecraft Fabric mod that allows you to customize the F3 debug menu keybinding.

  What it does

  By default, Minecraft uses the F3 key to toggle the debug overlay. This mod lets you rebind that key to any key you
  prefer through the game's controls menu.

  Features

  - Custom keybinding for the F3 debug menu
  - Fully configurable in Minecraft's controls settings
  - Clean implementation using Fabric API and Mixins
  - Work with ever debug shortcut, F3+G etc.

  Usage

  1. Launch Minecraft
  2. Go to Options → Controls → Key Binds
  3. Find "Open Debug Menu (F3)" under the "Debug Menu" category
  4. Rebind it to any key you want
